action.reasoning: Starting fresh. I'll build a CLIP ViT-L/14 based classifier with a linear head. Key design choices: (1) CLIP backbone for strong OOD generalization, (2) multi-GPU training, (3) focal loss for class imbalance, (4) quick baseline first to measure timing. I'll write train.py, model.py, predict.py, and a dataset.py.
